mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, description, use_yn, created_at FROM common_code_groups WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_code_groups (code, name, description, use_yn) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{useYn}) RETURNING id, code, name, description, use_yn, created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE common_code_groups SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id, code, name, description, use_yn, created_at
UPDATE common_code_groups SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, group_id, code, name, extra_value, sort_order, use_yn, created_at FROM common_codes WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order, code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_codes (group_id, code, name, extra_value, sort_order, use_yn) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{extraValue}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}) RETURNING id, group_id, code, name, extra_value, sort_order, use_yn, created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE common_codes SET name = #{name}, extra_value = #{extraValue}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id, group_id, code, name, extra_value, sort_order, use_yn, created_at
UPDATE common_codes SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
